title: Dichrotrichum asperifolium
taxonomy: Dichrotrichum asperifolium belongs to the family Bryaceae, which is a family of mosses. It is a genus of mosses that is native to tropical regions. The classification of Dichrotrichum asperifolium is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Bryophyta, Class: Bryopsida, Order: Bryales, Family: Bryaceae, Genus: Dichrotrichum, Species: D. asperifolium. This classification indicates its position within the plant kingdom. The specific classification helps in identifying the plant's characteristics and its place in the plant taxonomy.
